---
title: "Sankey 5G"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-27"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Step 2: Load packages
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(networkD3)
library(htmlwidgets)
```
```{r}
# Step 3: Set working directory
# Change this to your folder
setwd("C:/Users/Sshaikh9/Downloads")
```
```{r}
# Step 4: Read DAVID-style Excel file
df <- read_excel("Sankey_DAVID_style_source.xlsx", sheet = "Sankey_Links")
```
```{r}
library(readxl)

excel_sheets("Sankey_DAVID_style_source.xlsx")
```
```{r}
df <- read_excel(
  "Sankey_DAVID_style_source.xlsx",
  sheet = 1
)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

links <- df %>%
  rename(
    source = Gene,
    target = Pathway,
    value = Weight
  )
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(networkD3)
library(htmlwidgets)

df <- read_excel("Sankey_DAVID_style_source.xlsx", sheet = 1)

links <- df %>%
  select(Term, Genes) %>%
  separate_rows(Genes, sep = ";\\s*|,\\s*") %>%
  mutate(
    source = trimws(Genes),
    target = trimws(Term),
    value = 1,
    group = target
  ) %>%
  filter(source != "", target != "")

gene_order <- c(
  "KMT2A", "NANAOG", "HSPA1A", "PCNA", "KRT8", "KRT7",
  "NANOG", "KLF4", "DNMT3A", "MYCT2", "KDM6B", "KRT15",
  "DMT3A", "MYCT1", "MYCBP2"
)

pathway_order <- c(
  "MYC Pathway",
  "FGF Signaling",
  "TGF-β Pathway",
  "ERK/MAPK signaling pathway",
  "VEGFA-VEGFR2 Pathway",
  "PPAR signaling pathway",
  "Wnt/β-catenin signaling pathway",
  "NOTCH Signaling Pathway"
)

nodes <- data.frame(
  name = c(gene_order, pathway_order)
)

links <- links %>%
  filter(source %in% nodes$name, target %in% nodes$name)

links$IDsource <- match(links$source, nodes$name) - 1
links$IDtarget <- match(links$target, nodes$name) - 1

colourScale <- JS(
  'd3.scaleOrdinal()
    .domain(["MYC Pathway","FGF Signaling","TGF-β Pathway",
             "ERK/MAPK signaling pathway","VEGFA-VEGFR2 Pathway",
             "PPAR signaling pathway","Wnt/β-catenin signaling pathway",
             "NOTCH Signaling Pathway"])
    .range(["#9fd8e8","#77cfe0","#71d0c1",
            "#8ea0c8","#f2a08b","#9aa8c8",
            "#a8ded8","#cfe5a7"])'
)

p <- sankeyNetwork(
  Links = links,
  Nodes = nodes,
  Source = "IDsource",
  Target = "IDtarget",
  Value = "value",
  NodeID = "name",
  LinkGroup = "group",
  colourScale = colourScale,
  fontSize = 22,
  fontFamily = "Arial",
  nodeWidth = 22,
  nodePadding = 15,
  sinksRight = TRUE,
  iterations = 0
)

p
# 6. Save as HTML
saveWidget(p, "Gene_Pathway_Sankey.html", selfcontained = TRUE)
```
